name: Polisan Holding A.S.
summary: Polisan Holding A.S., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells chemical materials in Turkey. The company offers formaldehyde, formaldehyde resins, construction chemicals, and AUS 32; polyethylene terephthalate granules and preforms; paints; and bulk liquid storage, general warehouse, and loading and unloading services for dry bulk and general cargo vessels. It also provides polyethylene terephthalate resin and preform products for use in beverage, water, food, drink, and food containers, as well as in synthetic fibers. In addition, the company engages in the construction of water channels, roads, bridges, dams, sewers, and infrastructure facilities; trading and manufacturing of construction and installation materials; and organizing domestic and overseas trips for tourism, occupation, and education purposes. Polisan Holding A.S. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Dilovasi, Turkey.
